emails.subject: Ally Financial — Stipulations Cleared — Deal #4821 / Mitchell / FL-SSA-2841
emails.body_text:
Noah Alvarez
Funding & Contracts Clerk
Sunshine & Set Automotive

RE: Deal #4821 / Customer: Sarah E. Mitchell / Dealer Code: FL-SSA-2841
Ally Reference Number: ALY-2026-0414-8823
VIN: 1HGCV1F34PA112847

Dear Noah,

This message confirms that all required stipulations for the above-referenced contract have been received and cleared by Ally Financial as of April 14, 2026 at 11:47 AM ET.

STIPULATIONS CLEARED (5 of 5):

1. Signed Retail Installment Sale Contract — RECEIVED & APPROVED
2. Proof of Income (2 recent pay stubs - Adventist Health) — RECEIVED & APPROVED
3. Proof of Residence (Duke Energy utility bill dated 04/05/2026) — RECEIVED & APPROVED
4. Insurance Declaration Page (Progressive Policy #0934-74-2281, Ally Financial listed as loss payee) — RECEIVED & APPROVED
5. Valid Driver's License (Florida DL M123-456-78-900-0) — RECEIVED & APPROVED

CONTRACT STATUS: CLEARED FOR FUNDING

Contract Amount: $31,665.00
APR: 6.99%
Term: 72 months
Expected Wire Date: Per standard Ally processing timeline

FUNDING INSTRUCTIONS:

To complete the funding process, please submit the complete funding package via Ally SecureLink portal by end of business April 14, 2026. The funding package must include all executed documents, stip verification, and dealer certification.

Wire Transfer Details:
Routing Number: 026009593
Account Number: 4801-229-554
Beneficiary: Sunshine & Set Automotive

Please ensure all documentation is uploaded to SecureLink by 5:00 PM ET today to meet the expected funding timeline. If you have any questions regarding this contract or the funding process, please contact me directly.

Thank you for your business.

Best regards,

Carlos Mendez
Dealer Relations Specialist
Ally Financial
carlos.mendez@ally.com
Direct: (800) 555-2929 ext. 4418

emails.subject: April 2026 Month-End Close Calendar
emails.body_text:
Accounting Team,

Please find attached the April 2026 Month-End Close Calendar. All deadlines are firm and must be met to ensure timely close.

========================================
APRIL 2026 MONTH-END CLOSE CALENDAR
========================================

LAST BUSINESS DAY — APRIL 30, 2026 (Thursday):
• Finalize all deal postings — Jasmine Patel
• Ensure all April deals are posted and reconciled by end of day
• No deals may be posted to April after 5:00 PM on April 30

BUSINESS DAY 1 — MAY 1, 2026 (Friday):
• Floorplan reconciliation (all units) — Darius Kim
• CIT aging report and variance analysis — Noah Alvarez
• Verify all floor plan interest calculations

BUSINESS DAY 2 — MAY 4, 2026 (Monday):
• Accounts Payable accruals — Caleb Foster
• Payroll accruals and commission verification — Leah Morgan
• Chargeback tracker update and review — Jasmine Patel

BUSINESS DAY 3 — MAY 5, 2026 (Tuesday):
• Bank reconciliation preparation — Renee Lawson (prepare)
• Bank reconciliation review — Marcus Hale (review/approve)
• All bank statements must be reconciled by end of day

BUSINESS DAY 4 — MAY 6, 2026 (Wednesday):
• Receivable review and aging analysis — Renee Lawson
• Journal entries due from all clerks — All Accounting Staff
• Submit all adjusting entries to Marcus Hale by 3:00 PM

BUSINESS DAY 5 — MAY 7, 2026 (Thursday):
• Close binder review and sign-off — Marcus Hale
• All supporting documentation must be complete
• Controller preliminary review begins

BUSINESS DAY 7 — MAY 11, 2026 (Monday):
• Controller final sign-off — Elena Brooks
• Financial statements finalized
• Close package delivered to ownership

========================================
ADDITIONAL DEADLINES
========================================

COMMISSION CUTOFF — APRIL 16, 2026:
• All commission sheets due to Leah Morgan by 5:00 PM
• Sales managers must submit final April commission calculations
• No late submissions will be processed for April payroll

PAYROLL SUPPORT DOCUMENTS — APRIL 18, 2026:
• Commission support documentation due to Hannah Price (Payroll)
• Include backup for all bonuses, spiffs, and commission overrides
• Leah Morgan to coordinate submission

========================================
IMPORTANT NOTES
========================================

1. All team members are responsible for meeting their assigned deadlines
2. Any anticipated delays must be communicated to me immediately
3. Supporting documentation must be complete and organized
4. Questions regarding close procedures should be directed to Marcus Hale
5. The close timeline is non-negotiable — plan your workload accordingly

Please acknowledge receipt of this calendar by replying to this email. If you have any questions or concerns about your assigned tasks, please let me know as soon as possible.

Thank you,

Elena Brooks
Controller
Sunshine & Set Automotive
elena.brooks@sunshineandsetauto.com
Phone: (954) 555-0142
